name: intent-stories
description: Durable intent story documentation and fidelity auditing skills for coding agents

interface.longDescription: Intent Stories helps coding agents create, audit, and safely maintain long-lived repository documentation that describes what software is for from a user perspective. It separates accepted intent from observed behavior so implementation drift can be reported instead of silently rewritten into the docs.
defaultPrompt: Generate draft intent stories for this repository from docs, tests, and public workflows.
Audit the existing intent stories against current tests, commands, and user-facing behavior.
Update intent stories after this change while preserving accepted intent and reporting drift.
